title:
list of accredited employers

content:
## list of accredited employers
List of schools across New Zealand which are accredited employers
aplying for jobs at the right place

### Response from Ministry of Education
Status Different agency responsible
Comments This required information should go to Immigration New Zealand. The Ministery of Education doesn't hold this required information.
